field_or_group: branch topology and signed path mdot
minimum_evidence: Discrete path mass balances and pressure nodes show whether an entire modeled path reverses.
missing_behavior: If absent do not open signed-flow implementation; route local reverse flow to diagnostic/MF-04 review.

minimum_evidence: Same-window reverse area fraction reverse mass fraction and secondary-flow metric on named planes or region boundaries.
missing_behavior: If absent ordinary admission is blocked; row may remain diagnostic-only.

minimum_evidence: Endpoint or station pressure fields with hydrostatic and sign convention recorded.
missing_behavior: If absent pressure residual cannot be scored or fit.

minimum_evidence: Kinetic correction and q_ref throughflow status from the same time window as pressure.
missing_behavior: If near-zero or cancellation-dominated return no-fit diagnostic status.

minimum_evidence: Accepted centerline lengths plus straight/developing reference terms for the same section.
missing_behavior: If missing residual is partial only and cannot be admitted.

minimum_evidence: Coherent CFD region/volume mask for the recirculation cell and its volume.
missing_behavior: If absent MF-04 remains a conceptual interface with no exchange state.

minimum_evidence: Flux across an interface between main throughflow and recirculation cell or another conservative exchange estimator.
missing_behavior: If absent residence time and exchange energy terms are missing; no coefficient fitting.

minimum_evidence: Same-window enthalpy-weighted main-stream and recirculation-cell temperatures with property mode.
missing_behavior: If absent energy residual cannot be closed and internal Nu fitting remains blocked.

minimum_evidence: Wall heat flux/source/sink ledgers separated into setup inputs solved states and diagnostic outputs.
missing_behavior: If absent do not absorb thermal residual into internal Nu or exchange coefficient.

minimum_evidence: Model scoring must use training-only calibration and no held-out CFD outputs at runtime.
missing_behavior: If absent dry interface may be documented but not admitted.

minimum_evidence: Same-label same-formula same-sign same-window uncertainty for residuals and regime metrics.
missing_behavior: If absent keep diagnostic-only and list blocker.
